svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/145.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.5.2" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="SkX0lv7d--Fx5XJ5uU1j"> <mxGraphModel dx="15720" dy="10060" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml EasySave_Overview_By_Functional_Packages

skinparam shadowing false
skinparam dpi 170
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam linetype ortho

skinparam class {
 BackgroundColor #F7F9FC
 BorderColor #2F3A4A
 FontColor #1C2A3A
}

skinparam interface {
 BackgroundColor #EEF3FF
 BorderColor #2F3A4A
 FontColor #1C2A3A
}

skinparam enum {
 BackgroundColor #FFF7E6
 BorderColor #2F3A4A
 FontColor #1C2A3A
}

skinparam note {
 BackgroundColor #FFFDE7
 BorderColor #C8B560
}

title <b>EasySave</b>\n<i>Overview class diagram by functional packages (Core / App / EasyLog)</i>

legend right
 <<Core>> : EasySave.Core
 <<App>> : EasySave.App
 <<EasyLog>> : EasySave.EasyLog
 UI (Console/GUI) and LogHub server intentionally excluded
 --
 Green links: Jobs
 Blue links: Execution
 Purple links: Logs
 Teal links: Settings
 Light green links: State
 Orange links: Encryption
 Ocher links: Utilities / business software detection
 Gray links: Cross-cutting links
endlegend

package \"Settings / configuration\" as PKG_SETTINGS #F6FFF4 {
 package \"Core settings model / enums\" as PKG_SETTINGS_CORE {
 enum \"Language\" as Core_Language <<Core>> {
 English
 French
 }
 class \"AppConfig\" as Core_AppConfig <<Core>> {
 +Language : Language
 +LogFormat : LogFormat
 +LogStorageMode : LogStorageMode
 +BusinessSoftwareProcessName : string?
 +EncryptionEnabled : bool
 +EncryptionKey : string
 +ExtensionsToEncrypt : List<string>
 +LargeFileThresholdKb : int
 }
 }

 package \"Path infrastructure\" as PKG_SETTINGS_APP_INFRA {
 interface \"IPathProvider\" as Core_IPathProvider <<Core>> {
 +ConfigPath : string
 +LogsPath : string
 +EnsureDirectoriesCreated()
 }
 class \"PathProvider\" as App_PathProvider <<App>> {
 +ConfigPath : string
 +LogsPath : string
 +EnsureDirectoriesCreated()
 }
 class \"AppConfigRepository\" as App_AppConfigRepository <<App>> {
 +Load() : AppConfig
 +Save(config : AppConfig)
 }
 }

 package \"App service\" as PKG_SETTINGS_APP_SERVICE {
 class \"SettingsService\" as App_SettingsService <<App>> {
 -_config : AppConfig
 -_repository : AppConfigRepository
 +ToggleEncryption()
 +UpdateEncryptionKey(newKey : string)
 +UpdateLanguage(lang : Language)
 +UpdateLogFormat(format : LogFormat)
 +UpdateLogStorageMode(storageMode : LogStorageMode)
 +UpdateLogServerConnection(host : string, port : int)
 +UpdateBusinessSoftwareProcessName(name : string?)
 +UpdateExtensionsToEncrypt(extensions : List<string>)
 +ApplySettings(encryptionEnabled, encryptionKey, language, logFormat, logStorageMode, logServerHost, logServerPort, extensionsToEncrypt, businessSoftwareProcessName, largeFileThresholdKb)
 +UpdateLargeFileThreshold(kb : int)
 }
 }
}

package \"Job management\" as PKG_JOBS #F7F9FC {
 package \"Job model (Core)\" as PKG_JOBS_CORE {
 class \"BackupJob\" as Core_BackupJob <<Core>> {
 +Id : string
 +Name : string
 +SourcePath : string
 +TargetPath : string
 +Type : BackupType
 +IsActive : bool
 +CreatedAt : DateTime
 +LastRun : DateTime?
 +PriorityExtensions : List<string>
 +Enable()
 +Disable()
 +MarkExecuted(nowUtc : DateTime? = null)
 +UpdateDefinition(name, sourcePath, targetPath, type, priorityExtensions)
 +ToString() : string
 }
 enum \"BackupType\" as Core_BackupType <<Core>> {
 Full
 Differential
 }
 }

 package \"Job repository\" as PKG_JOBS_APP_REPO {
 interface \"IJobRepository\" as Core_IJobRepository <<Core>> {
 +GetAll()
 +GetById(id)
 +Add(job)
 +Update(job)
 +Remove(id)
 }
 class \"JobRepository\" as App_JobRepository <<App>> {
 -_jobs : List<BackupJob>
 +GetAll()
 +GetById(id)
 +Add(job)
 +Update(job)
 +Remove(id)
 }
 }

 package \"Job service\" as PKG_JOBS_APP_SERVICE {
 interface \"IJobService\" as Core_IJobService <<Core>> {
 +GetAll()
 +GetById(id)
 +Create(id, name, sourcePath, targetPath, type, isActive = true, priorityExtensions = null)
 +Update(id, name, sourcePath, targetPath, type, isActive, priorityExtensions)
 +Delete(id)
 +MarkExecuted(id)
 }
 class \"JobService\" as App_JobService <<App>> {
 -_jobRepository : IJobRepository
 -_logService : IAppLogService?
 +GetAll()
 +GetById(id)
 +Create(id, name, sourcePath, targetPath, type, isActive, priorityExtensions)
 +Update(id, name, sourcePath, targetPath, type, isActive, priorityExtensions)
 +Delete(id)
 +MarkExecuted(id, nowUtc = null)
 }
 }
}

package \"Backup execution\" as PKG_EXEC #EEF7FF {
 package \"Backup service orchestration\" as PKG_EXEC_APP_ORCH {
 interface \"IBackupService\" as Core_IBackupService <<Core>> {
 +Run(job) : BackupResultDto
 +Pause(jobId) : bool
 +Resume(jobId) : bool
 +Stop(jobId) : bool
 +CanStartSequence(out reason) : bool
 +StateChanged (event)
 }
 class \"BackupService\" as App_BackupService <<App>> {
 -_backupEngine : IBackupEngine
 -_jobService : IJobService
 -_stateWriter : IStateWriter
 -_config : AppConfig
 +Run(job)
 +Pause(jobId)
 +Resume(jobId)
 +Stop(jobId)
 +CanStartSequence(out reason)
 +StateChanged (event)
 }
 }

 package \"Backup engine\" as PKG_EXEC_ENGINE {
 interface \"IBackupEngine\" as Core_IBackupEngine <<Core>> {
 +Run(job) : BackupResultDto
 +Pause(jobId) : bool
 +Resume(jobId) : bool
 +Stop(jobId) : bool
 +StateChanged (event)
 }
 class \"BackupEngine\" as App_BackupEngine <<App>> {
 -_config : AppConfig
 -_cryptoService : ICryptoService
 -_logService : IAppLogService?
 +Run(job)
 +Pause(jobId)
 +Resume(jobId)
 +Stop(jobId)
 +StateChanged (event)
 }
 }

 package \"Execution models (Core)\" as PKG_EXEC_CORE {
 class \"BackupResultDto\" as Core_BackupResultDto <<Core>> {
 +Success : bool
 +Message : string
 +CopiedCount : int
 +SkippedCount : int
 +ErrorCount : int
 +Duration : TimeSpan
 }
 enum \"JobStatus\" as Core_JobStatus <<Core>> {
 Idle
 Running
 Paused
 Completed
 Error
 }
 }

 package \"Copy strategies\" as PKG_EXEC_STRATEGIES {
 interface \"IBackupCopyStrategy\" as Core_IBackupCopyStrategy <<Core>> {
 +ShouldCopy(source, target) : bool
 }
 class \"DifferentialCopyStrategy\" as App_DifferentialStrategy <<App>> {
 +ShouldCopy(source, target) : bool
 }
 class \"FullCopyStrategy\" as App_FullStrategy <<App>> {
 +ShouldCopy(source, target) : bool
 }
 }

 package \"Runtime controls / scheduling\" as PKG_EXEC_RUNTIME {
 class \"JobExecutionControl\" as App_JobExecutionControl <<App>> {
 +RequestPause()
 +RequestResume()
 +RequestStop()
 +WaitWhilePaused()
 }
 class \"PriorityMonitor\" as App_PriorityMonitor <<App>> {
 +EnterPriorityZone()
 +ExitPriorityZone()
 +IsPriorityWorkActive : bool
 }
 class \"LargeFileTransferLimiter\" as App_LargeFileTransferLimiter <<App>> {
 +AcquireAsync(fileSize, threshold)
 }
 }
}

package \"State management\" as PKG_STATE #E8F5E9 {
 package \"State models / events (Core)\" as PKG_STATE_CORE {
 class \"JobStateDto\" as Core_JobStateDto <<Core>> {
 +JobId : string
 +JobName : string
 +Status : JobStatus
 +ProgressPercentage : int
 +CurrentSourceFile : string?
 +CurrentTargetFile : string?
 }
 class \"AppStateDto\" as Core_AppStateDto <<Core>> {
 +GeneratedAtUtc : DateTime
 +GlobalStatus : JobStatus
 +Jobs : List<JobStateDto>
 }
 class \"JobStateChangedEventArgs\" as Core_JobStateChangedEventArgs <<Core>> {
 +State : JobStateDto
 }
 }

 package \"State persistence\" as PKG_STATE_APP {
 interface \"IStateWriter\" as Core_IStateWriter <<Core>> {
 +Write(snapshot : AppStateDto)
 }
 class \"StateWriter\" as App_StateWriter <<App>> {
 +Write(snapshot : AppStateDto)
 }
 }
}

package \"Encryption\" as PKG_CRYPTO #FFF3E0 {
 package \"Crypto services\" as PKG_CRYPTO_CORE {
 interface \"ICryptoService\" as Core_ICryptoService <<Core>> {
 +EncryptFileAsync(path, key)
 }
 class \"CryptoSoftProcessService\" as App_CryptoSoftProcessService <<App>> {
 +EncryptFileAsync(path, key)
 }
 class \"NoEncryptionService\" as App_NoEncryptionService <<App>> {
 +EncryptFileAsync(path, key)
 }
 }
}

package \"Utilities\" as PKG_UTILS #FFF8E1 {
 package \"Business software detection\" as PKG_BIZSOFT_APP {
 class \"BusinessSoftwareDetector\" as App_BusinessSoftwareDetector <<App>> {
 +IsRunning(processName) : bool
 +ValidateNotRunning(processName)
 }
 }

 package \"UNC path utility\" as PKG_UTILS_UNC {
 class \"UncResolver\" as App_UncResolver <<App>> {
 +ResolveToUncForLog(path) : string
 }
 }
}

package \"App internal logging\" as PKG_APPLOG #FCE4EC {
 package \"Core log model / facade contract\" as PKG_APPLOG_CORE {
 interface \"IAppLogService\" as Core_IAppLogService <<Core>> {
 +Write(entry : LogEntryDto)
 +LogWritten (event)
 }
 class \"LogEntryBuilder\" as Core_LogEntryBuilder <<Core>> {
 +Create(eventName, category, action, message = \"\")
 +WithTraceIfPresent(traceId)
 +WithJob(id, name, type, sourcePath, targetPath, status = null, isActive = null)
 +WithFile(sourcePath, targetPath, sizeBytes, transferTimeMs, isDirectory = false)
 +WithCrypto(tool, extensionMatched, encryptionTimeMs, extension = null, instanceLock = null)
 +WithSettings(language, logFormat, logDirectory = null, configPath = null, logStorageMode = null, logServerHost = null, logServerPort = null, encryptionEnabled = null, extensionsToEncrypt = null, businessSoftwareProcessName = null, largeFileThresholdKb = null)
 +WithSummary(copiedCount, skippedCount, errorCount, totalBytes, durationMs, details = null)
 +WithOutcome(outcome)
 +WithLevel(level)
 +Fail(errorType, errorMessage, errorCode = null, errorStack = null)
 +Build() : LogEntryDto
 }
 class \"LogEntryDto\" as Core_LogEntryDto <<Core>> {
 +TimestampUtc : DateTime
 +Level : LogLevel
 +Message : string
 +SchemaVersion : int
 +Event : LogEventDto
 +App : LogAppDto?
 +Trace : LogTraceDto?
 +Host : LogHostDto?
 +Job : LogJobDto?
 +File : LogFileDto?
 +Crypto : LogCryptoDto?
 +Settings : LogSettingsDto?
 +Summary : LogSummaryDto?
 +Error : LogErrorDto?
 }
 class \"LogEventDto\" as Core_LogEventDto <<Core>> {
 +Name : string
 +Category : LogEventCategory
 +Action : LogEventAction
 +Outcome : LogEventOutcome
 }
 class \"LogAppDto\" as Core_LogAppDto <<Core>> {
 +Name : string
 +Version : string
 }
 class \"LogTraceDto\" as Core_LogTraceDto <<Core>> {
 +Id : string
 }
 class \"LogHostDto\" as Core_LogHostDto <<Core>> {
 +Name : string
 +User : string
 +Pid : int?
 }
 class \"LogJobDto\" as Core_LogJobDto <<Core>> {
 +Id : string
 +Name : string
 +Type : BackupType?
 +Status : JobStatus?
 +IsActive : bool?
 +SourcePath : string?
 +TargetPath : string?
 }
 class \"LogFileDto\" as Core_LogFileDto <<Core>> {
 +SourcePath : string?
 +TargetPath : string?
 +SizeBytes : long?
 +TransferTimeMs : double?
 +IsDirectory : bool?
 }
 class \"LogCryptoDto\" as Core_LogCryptoDto <<Core>> {
 +Tool : string
 +ExtensionMatched : bool
 +EncryptionTimeMs : long
 +Extension : string?
 +InstanceLock : string?
 }
 class \"LogSettingsDto\" as Core_LogSettingsDto <<Core>> {
 +Language : Language?
 +LogFormat : LogFormat?
 +LogStorageMode : LogStorageMode?
 +LogDirectory : string?
 +ConfigPath : string?
 +LogServerHost : string?
 +LogServerPort : int?
 +EncryptionEnabled : bool?
 +ExtensionsToEncrypt : List<string>?
 +BusinessSoftwareProcessName : string?
 +LargeFileThresholdKb : int?
 }
 class \"LogSummaryDto\" as Core_LogSummaryDto <<Core>> {
 +CopiedCount : int
 +SkippedCount : int
 +ErrorCount : int
 +TotalBytes : long
 +DurationMs : double
 +Details : string?
 }
 class \"LogErrorDto\" as Core_LogErrorDto <<Core>> {
 +Type : string?
 +Code : string?
 +Message : string?
 +Stack : string?
 }
 class \"LogContext\" as Core_LogContext <<Core>> {
 +AppName : string
 +AppVersion : string
 +HostName : string
 +UserName : string
 +ProcessId : int
 }
 enum \"LogLevel\" as Core_LogLevel <<Core>> {
 Emergency
 Alert
 Critical
 Error
 Warning
 Notice
 Info
 Debug
 }
 enum \"LogEventCategory\" as Core_LogEventCategory <<Core>> {
 System
 Job
 File
 Settings
 }
 enum \"LogEventAction\" as Core_LogEventAction <<Core>> {
 Unknown
 Create
 Update
 Delete
 Save
 Transfer
 Skip
 DirectoryCreated
 Summary
 Pause
 Resume
 Stop
 }
 enum \"LogEventOutcome\" as Core_LogEventOutcome <<Core>> {
 Success
 Failure
 Unknown
 }
 }

 package \"App logging services\" as PKG_APPLOG_APP {
 class \"AppLogService\" as App_AppLogService <<App>> {
 -_logger : ILogger<LogEntryDto>?
 +Write(entry : LogEntryDto)
 +LogWritten (event)
 }
 class \"LogReaderService\" as App_LogReaderService <<App>> {
 -_logReader : ILogReader<LogEntryDto>?
 +ReadEntries(maxFiles)
 +ReadAllEntries()
 }
 }
}

package \"EasyLog\" as PKG_EASYLOG #FFF6FB {
 package \"Loggers\" as PKG_EASYLOG_LOGGERS {
 interface \"ILogger<T>\" as EasyLog_ILogger <<EasyLog>> {
 +Write(entry) : bool
 }
 class \"DailyLogger<T>\" as EasyLog_DailyLogger <<EasyLog>> {
 +Write(entry) : bool
 }
 class \"SafeLogger<T>\" as EasyLog_SafeLogger <<EasyLog>> {
 +Write(entry) : bool
 }
 class \"WebSocketLogger<T>\" as EasyLog_WebSocketLogger <<EasyLog>> {
 +Write(entry) : bool
 }
 }

 package \"Readers\" as PKG_EASYLOG_READERS {
 interface \"ILogReader<T>\" as EasyLog_ILogReader <<EasyLog>> {
 +LogDirectory : string
 +GetLogFiles(maxFiles = null) : IReadOnlyList<string>
 +ReadEntries(maxFiles) : IReadOnlyList<T>
 +ReadAllEntries() : IReadOnlyList<T>
 +ReadEntriesFromFile(path) : IReadOnlyList<T>
 }
 class \"LocalFileLogReader<T>\" as EasyLog_LocalFileLogReader <<EasyLog>> {
 +LogDirectory : string
 +GetLogFiles(maxFiles = null)
 +ReadEntries(maxFiles = 7)
 +ReadAllEntries()
 +ReadEntriesFromFile(filePath)
 }
 class \"WebSocketLogReader<T>\" as EasyLog_WebSocketLogReader <<EasyLog>> {
 +LogDirectory : string
 +GetLogFiles(maxFiles = null)
 +ReadEntries(maxFiles = 7)
 +ReadAllEntries()
 +ReadEntriesFromFile(filePath)
 }
 }

 package \"Writers / serializers\" as PKG_EASYLOG_IO {
 interface \"ILogSerializer\" as EasyLog_ILogSerializer <<EasyLog>> {
 +Serialize(entry) : string
 +FileExtension : string
 }
 interface \"ILogWriter\" as EasyLog_ILogWriter <<EasyLog>> {
 +Write(filePath, message) : bool
 }
 class \"JsonSerializer\" as EasyLog_JsonSerializer <<EasyLog>> {
 +Serialize(entry) : string
 +FileExtension : string
 }
 class \"XmlSerializer\" as EasyLog_XmlSerializer <<EasyLog>> {
 +Serialize(entry) : string
 +FileExtension : string
 }
 class \"FileLogWriter\" as EasyLog_FileLogWriter <<EasyLog>> {
 +Write(filePath, message) : bool
 }
 }

 package \"Factories / options\" as PKG_EASYLOG_FACTORY {
 class \"LoggerFactory\" as EasyLog_LoggerFactory <<EasyLog>> {
 +Create<T>(options) : ILogger<T>
 }
 class \"LogReaderFactory\" as EasyLog_LogReaderFactory <<EasyLog>> {
 +Create<T>(options) : ILogReader<T>
 }
 class \"LogOptions\" as EasyLog_LogOptions <<EasyLog>> {
 +LogDirectory : string
 +Format : LogFormat
 +UseSafeLogger : bool
 +StorageMode : LogStorageMode
 +Server : LogServerOptions?
 }
 class \"LogServerOptions\" as EasyLog_LogServerOptions <<EasyLog>> {
 +Host : string
 +Port : int
 +WebSocketUrl : string
 +ConnectTimeoutMs : int
 +ReceiveTimeoutMs : int
 }
 enum \"LogFormat\" as EasyLog_LogFormat <<EasyLog>> {
 Json
 Xml
 }
 enum \"LogStorageMode\" as EasyLog_LogStorageMode <<EasyLog>> {
 LocalOnly
 ServerOnly
 LocalAndServer
 }
 }

 package \"Transport\" as PKG_EASYLOG_TRANSPORT {
 class \"LogHubWebSocketClient\" as EasyLog_LogHubWebSocketClient <<EasyLog>> {
 +SendWrite(extension, serializedEntry, timestampUtc) : bool
 +ReadEntries(maxFiles : int?, readAll : bool) : IReadOnlyList<RemoteLogEntry>
 }
 }
}

' Layout helpers (package ordering only)
PKG_SETTINGS -[hidden]down-> PKG_JOBS
PKG_JOBS -[hidden]right-> PKG_EXEC
PKG_EXEC -[hidden]down-> PKG_STATE
PKG_STATE -[hidden]down-> PKG_CRYPTO
PKG_CRYPTO -[hidden]down-> PKG_UTILS
PKG_EXEC -[hidden]right-> PKG_APPLOG
PKG_APPLOG -[hidden]down-> PKG_EASYLOG

App_JobService ..[#2E7D32]|> Core_IJobService

App_JobService -[#2E7D32]-> Core_BackupJob

App_DifferentialStrategy ..[#1565C0]|> Core_IBackupCopyStrategy
App_FullStrategy ..[#1565C0]|> Core_IBackupCopyStrategy
App_BackupService -[#1565C0]-> Core_IBackupEngine

App_StateWriter ..[#66BB6A]|> Core_IStateWriter

App_BackupService -[#66BB6A]-> Core_JobStateDto
App_BackupService -[#66BB6A]-> Core_AppStateDto
App_BackupService ..[#66BB6A]> Core_JobStateChangedEventArgs
App_BackupEngine -[#66BB6A]-> Core_JobStateDto
App_BackupEngine ..[#66BB6A]> Core_JobStateChangedEventArgs

' =========================

App_CryptoSoftProcessService ..[#EF6C00]|> Core_ICryptoService

App_LogReaderService -[#8E24AA]-> Core_LogEntryDto
App_LogReaderService ..[#8E24AA]> EasyLog_LogReaderFactory

Core_LogEntryBuilder -[#8E24AA]-> Core_LogEntryDto

EasyLog_LocalFileLogReader ..[#8E24AA]|> EasyLog_ILogReader
EasyLog_WebSocketLogReader ..[#8E24AA]|> EasyLog_ILogReader

' =========================

' =========================
' Cross-package links
' =========================
note as N_CROSS
 Cross-package class links are intentionally hidden
 to avoid clutter between packages.
 Exception: utility links to UncResolver and execution links to crypto/business detection are shown.
 Minimal logging links to EasyLog factories are also shown.
end note

note bottom of PKG_EXEC
 Execution package = orchestration, engine, and copy strategies.
 Encryption and state management are separated for readability.
end note

note bottom of PKG_STATE
 State package = state DTOs, state-changed event, and state.json persistence.
end note

note bottom of PKG_APPLOG
 App internal logging = logging facade + log reading services.
 This layer consumes EasyLog without exposing technical details to other services.
end note

note bottom of PKG_EASYLOG
 EasyLog = technical logging library (factory, logger, reader, serializer, writer, WebSocket).
end note

Cross-package class links are intentionally hidden
Exception: utility links to UncResolver and execution links to crypto/business detection are shown.
Minimal logging links to EasyLog factories are also shown.
Execution package = orchestration, engine, and copy strategies.
Encryption and state management are separated for readability.
State package = state DTOs, state-changed event, and state.json persistence.
App internal logging = logging facade + log reading services.
This layer consumes EasyLog without exposing technical details to other services.
EasyLog = technical logging library (factory, logger, reader, serializer, writer, WebSocket).
UI (Console/GUI) and LogHub server intentionally excluded
Ocher links: Utilities / business software detection
